name: python3-diskcache
title: python3-diskcache
summary: Python3 module for disk and file backed persistent cache
description:
Python3 module for disk and file backed persistent cache
DiskCache is a disk and file backed cache library, written in pure-Python.
Its features include
.
- Django compatible API
- Thread-safe and process-safe
- Supports multiple eviction policies (LRU and LFU included)
- Keys support “tag” metadata and eviction
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-diskcache because Python3 module for disk and file backed persistent cache.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-diskcache as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-diskcache with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-diskcache --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
